DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Zachary A. Toran of Zachary A. Toran Attorney at Law (415-850-9067) appearing for plaintiff opposing party.
Atty. Page Perry of Bryan Cave (415-675-3400) appearing for defts' moving party.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANTs U.S. BANK, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule as to first cause of action. Sustain with leave to amend as to second through fourth causes of action. Second cause of action should allege payments. Third and fourth causes of action lacks specificity and no documents were attached and needs to address why documents not read and how there is a fiduciary duty. Prevailing party prepare court order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)
